message:
style(core): replace drop(prepare(...).unwrap()) with let _ in reuse-trace tests

Cosmetic clippy/style tidy on the two
`test_statement_reuse_trace_*` tests added in the previous
commit. Clippy was flagging the `drop(conn.prepare(sql).unwrap())`
lines because `drop` on an owned value returned by `prepare` is
redundant — the value goes out of scope at the end of the
statement regardless.

Replace all eight occurrences across the two tests with
`let _ = conn.prepare(sql).unwrap();`, which has identical
semantics (the prepared handle is dropped at the end of the
statement) but does not trigger the clippy
`redundant_drop` lint. The two tests and their assertions are
otherwise unchanged.
